message:
🌱 Update setup dialog to use curlable start scripts (#339)

Simplified from 5 steps to 2:
1. Start the console (curl one-liner that bootstraps everything)
2. Open the console

- Fixed reference to nonexistent `./startup-demo.sh` (now uses curl)
- Removed manual "Install local agent" step (scripts handle brew
  install/upgrade automatically)
- Added expandable "Or clone manually" section for manual setup
- Updated prerequisites to include curl, fixed Go version to 1.22+

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
